category_sources: source_facts.description says modern format for Haskell packages; official GitHub README describes Hpack as a format and modern alternative to Cabal package files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hpack; official GitHub repository and README title use “hpack”.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README has reference documentation; Hackage package page points to the GitHub README and module documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project URL; Hackage page also points to https://github.com/sol/hpack#readme.
tags_sources: Official README documents package.yaml, Cabal generation, Stack support, and the hpack executable; source_facts.executables lists hpack.
